name: 哈莉温·阿玛尔布伦
name_full: 哈莉温·阿玛尔布伦 Khaliun Amarburen
introduction: Khaliun "Haluna" Amarburen is a Mongolian-American actress. She has most recently worked on Alaska Daily, an ABC/Hulu series and an untitled Apple TV+ Series. An imaginative, versatile actor, she can be a comedic character or a dramatic lead.Khaliun was born to a family of performing artists, the granddaughter of the acclaimed Primadonna of Mongolian Opera, Zagdsuren Ayush and daughter of Opera Singer and actor Amaraa Sanjid.Khaliun grew up in Arlington, VA where she performed at Signature Theatre. She attended Pepperdine University in Malibu, CA as a Posse Scholar on a merit-leadership based scholarship where she majored in International Studies and minored in Film Studies.She is fluent in English and Mongolian and conversational in Mandarin and Spanish.
